subject: Acme · short check-in
body:
Hi D. —

What We're Seeing
The Strategic Innovation pod is progressing steadily this week.

Quick Pulse Check
Dominant Logic has not shifted yet; flagging rather than pushing.

Preliminary Read
Happy to follow up next week once the board materials are ready.
notes: Skeleton — borderline soft sales hit ("follow up") with all three sections + canonical tags present. Plan §6.3 originally called for missing "Quick Pulse Check" too, but §4.1 makes missing_section high-severity; keeping headers intact is the only way to land a true borderline verdict. Content owner replaces with real Acme §2.8 body pre-demo.
